expected_properties: Outputs become X when any input is X
No deterministic value is produced when inputs contain X/Z
additional_cases.goal: Verify that unknown/illegal input values propagate to outputs as per combinational logic
notes: Testing X/Z propagation on a, b, and Cin
stimulus_intent: Drive X to each input individually and observe output behavior
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after inputs have stabilized

expected_properties: Co equals the carry-out of the 16‑bit addition
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate combinational sum functionality across random legal inputs
notes: Ensures basic functional correctness without assuming timing
stimulus_intent: Apply random legal values to a, b, and Cin
timing_assumptions: Outputs are expected to settle after input stabilization; sample after a short propagation delay

expected_properties: y correctly reflects overflow behavior at maximum operand values
Co correctly indicates overflow for boundary conditions
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Exercise boundary‑value patterns (all‑zeros, all‑ones, mixed extremes) on a, b, and Cin
notes: Focuses on extreme values to expose width‑related edge cases
stimulus_intent: Apply zero‑like, one‑like, and mixed boundary patterns to a, b, and Cin
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after inputs have stabilized; no fixed‑cycle latency assumed
